title: Report per-paper warning deltas in serial summaries and audits
problem: Serial run summaries currently store cumulative validation warnings after each accepted paper, so the operator must manually diff totals to identify which paper caused warning growth. The 16-paper run had warning totals 103, 103, 181, 250, 283, 285, 293, 310, hiding the +78 and +69 spikes until post-analysis.
proposed_change: Compute and persist per-paper warning and error deltas in summary.json and audit.json, including evidence-entry counts and issue locations for the newly accepted delta.
acceptance_criteria: Run summary and audit show warning_delta/error_delta per paper; monitor output can display the latest delta; large warning spikes are visible without manual report diffing.

observations.context: ag95-diverse-003-16p cumulative warning totals after fresh papers were 103, 103, 181, 250, 283, 285, 293, 310. Manual diffing was required to see that mr4701883 added +78 warnings and mr4777095 added +69 warnings.

ag95-diverse-004-replay-16p summary now records per-paper validation_warning_delta directly: baseline warning papers mr4433080 +31, mr4526821 +21, mr4712864 +30, mr4188814 +21; new warning spikes mr4701883 +78, mr4777095 +69, mr4712863 +33, mr4792069 +17. Audit fallback reports 310 latest warnings from summary.validation_delta when no validation-after reports exist.

history.note: Implemented per-paper validation_error_delta and validation_warning_delta in serial summaries/events and audit fallback reports.
